title: ocimum decumbens
intro: Ocimum decumbens, also known as Prostrate Basil, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family that is native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Ocimum decumbens include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. It can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and topical applications, where it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
